title: 删除检查点子树 (DestroySnapshotTree)
output:
=== RESULT ===
VM created: WMITEST_snapshot_tree_delete GUID=D2B1AF8D-4446-42E6-8D4F-C6EFDC776F9D
Baseline snapshot count = 0
Snapshot count after creating 3 = 3
Root snapshot ElementName='WMITEST_snapshot_tree_delete - (2026/7/1 - 2:22:29)' CreationTime=20260630182230.035779-000
DestroySnapshotTree ReturnValue=4096
DestroySnapshotTree job completed (JobState=7)
Snapshot count after DestroySnapshotTree = 0
Cleanup DestroySystem ReturnValue=4096
No residual test VM
STATUS: PASS
notes: DestroySnapshotTree(SnapshotSettingData REF, Job OUT)：传入根检查点的 __PATH，一次删除根及其全部子孙。返回 4096 时需轮询作业，作业终态 JobState=7 表示已完成。

CreateSnapshot 参数：(AffectedSystem REF, SnapshotSettings string, SnapshotType uint16, ResultingSnapshot IN/OUT REF, Job OUT)。SnapshotType=2=Full。ResultingSnapshot 为 IN/OUT，可传 $null；SnapshotSettings 传 $null 即可创建。
多级链自动形成：连续三次 CreateSnapshot，新检查点自动挂在分支最新检查点之下，经 Msvm_ParentChildSettingData 形成 snap1->snap2->snap3。根检查点为 CreationTime 最早的那个。
$vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') 返回的检查点存在重复(虚拟机经多个关联类指向同一检查点)，需按 __RELPATH 去重，并精确匹配类型 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Snapshot:Realized'(虚拟机本体为 ...System:Realized)。未去重时 3 个检查点会被计为 4 个。
检查点为 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData，VirtualSystemType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Snapshot:Realized'。可通过删除前 count=3、删除后 count=0 回到基线来验证。
该方法自 build 9200 起持续可用。
notes_en: DestroySnapshotTree(SnapshotSettingData REF, Job OUT): pass the __PATH of the root checkpoint to delete the root and all of its descendants in a single call. When 4096 is returned, the job must be polled; a terminal JobState=7 indicates completion.

CreateSnapshot parameters: (AffectedSystem REF, SnapshotSettings string, SnapshotType uint16, ResultingSnapshot IN/OUT REF, Job OUT). SnapshotType=2=Full. ResultingSnapshot is IN/OUT and may be passed as $null; passing $null for SnapshotSettings is sufficient to create a checkpoint.

A multi-level chain forms automatically: with three consecutive CreateSnapshot calls, each new checkpoint is automatically attached below the branch's most recent checkpoint, forming snap1->snap2->snap3 through Msvm_ParentChildSettingData. The root checkpoint is the one with the earliest CreationTime.

The checkpoints returned by $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData') contain duplicates (the virtual machine points to the same checkpoint through multiple association classes); de-duplicate by __RELPATH and match the type 'Microsoft:Hyper-V:Snapshot:Realized' exactly (the virtual machine itself is ...System:Realized). Without de-duplication, 3 checkpoints would be counted as 4.

A checkpoint is a Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData with VirtualSystemType='Microsoft:Hyper-V:Snapshot:Realized'. This can be verified by observing count=3 before deletion and count=0 (returning to the baseline) after deletion.
This method has been continuously available since build 9200.
